rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25 , 2012 Line 1 -DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO N.A SUCCESSOR BY MERGER WITH WELLS FARGO BANK SOUTHWEST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar. FAC filed 5/23/12. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GARY W BANKS et al VS. COAST CAPITAL INCOME FUND LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2012 Line 1 - DEFENDANTS COAST CAPITAL INCOME FUND LLC AND PLM LENDER SERVICE, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar. Case dismissed 5/4/2012, =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LEIDER PINEDO VS. JULIO CERON CERVANTES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2012 Line 3 - DEFENDANT CERON, JULIO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. "Notice to Pay Rent or Quit" is fatally defective. It inconsistently gives D "5" and/or "30" days to cure/vacate. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al VS. MELODY PANG
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25 ,2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT MELODY PANG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Denied, 5 days to plead. Complaint has a verification attached. Defendant does not provide any legal authority to challenge the sufficiency of that verification. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 50 BRONTE LLC VS. CLARINDO GOMES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2012 Line 7 - PLAINTIFF 50 BRONTE LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Granted, subject to opposition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: M.A. KARAH VS. ADEL AWADALLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defts; Memo P/A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 25, 2012 Line 6 - DEFENDANTs ADEL AWADALLA, SAMAA AWADALLA, DBA SUPREMO PIZZA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Off calendar. Defendant failed to comply with CCP 1167.4. =(501/AJR)
